nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Morelet's seedeater
nodes.summary: Morelet's seedeater（Morelet's seedeater，学名 Sporophila morelleti），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It mainly inhabits tropical and subtropical grasslands, savannas, and shrublands but can also be found in pastures, arable land, and heavily degraded former forests
